readme: xiaoqiang driver xiaoqiang motor drivers input topic |name|type|description| |cmd_vel|geometry_msgs/Twist|robot velocity| |infrared_sensor|std_msgs/Bool|infrared sensor enable flag| |imu_cal|std_msgs/Bool|imu correction flag| |globalMoveFlag|std_msgs/Bool|if false robot stop moving| output topic |name|type|rate|description| |odom|nav_msgs/Odometry|50hz|robot odometry| |pose2d|geometry_msgs/Pose2D|50hz|robot pose2d| |power|std_msgs/Float64|50hz|robot battery voltage| |twist|geometry_msgs/Twist|50hz|robot current twist| |bar_points|sensor_msgs/PointCloud2|None|objects detected infrared sensor| |clear_points|sensor_msgs/PointCloud2|None|no object target points| published transformation |name|relation|rate|description| |tf|odom–>base_footprint|50hz|robot transform| |tf_static|base_footprint–>base_link|100hz|robot transform| input param default description port /dev/xiaoqiang xiaoqiang serial port baud serial port baud rate wheel_separation distance wheels wheel_radius radius wheel debug_flag false debug flag max_speed max speed robot cmd_topic cmd_vel topic send velocity Usage: download ros workspace workspace] git clone https://github.com/BlueWhaleRobot/xiaoqiang.git catkin_make Quickstart roslaunch xiaoqiang_driver xiaoqiang_driver.launch :heart: BlueWhale Robot. 安装到小强ROS工作目录 git clone https://github.com/BlueWhaleRobot/xiaoqiang.git catkin_make roslaunch xiaoqiang_driver xiaoqiang_driver.launch :heart:

name: xiaoqiang_freenect
description:
A libfreenect-based ROS driver for the Microsoft Kinect
    Modified version of xiaoqiang_freenect_stack, add tilt angle control support

name: xiaoqiang_freenect_camera
description:
A libfreenect-based ROS driver for the Microsoft Kinect.  This is
    a port of the OpenNI driver that uses libfreenect instead, because
    on some systems with some devices it works better.
    Modified version of xiaoqiang_freenect_stack, add tilt angle control support
authors: Patrick Mihelich, Suat Gedikli, Radu Bogdan Rusu (original openni_camera driver)., Piyush Khandelwal (libfreenect port).

name: xiaoqiang_freenect_launch
description:
Launch files for xiaoqiang_freenect_camera to produce rectified, registered
    or disparity images.  Also produce point clouds and registered
    point clouds.  Based on the openni_launch package.
    Modified version of xiaoqiang_freenect_stack, add tilt angle control support
authors: Patrick Mihelich (original openni_launch package), Piyush Khandelwal (libfreenect port)

name: youbot_driver
description: driver for the KUKA youBot robot
readme: youBot API API documentation basic idea youBot API represent robot system combination decoupled functional sub-systems. API represents manipulator arm base platform combination joints. time joint defined combination motor gearbox. main classes youBot API user aware YouBotManipulator class represents youBot arm aggregation joints gripper YouBotBase class represents youBot base platform YouBotJoint class represents joints manipulator base Installation System requirements: Linux Ethernet adapter Root access Ethernet adapter libraries required youBot API: Simple Open EtherCAT master (included driver) Boost Libraries Installation rosmake: Install minimal installation ROS. ros.org) Clone youBot API sources: git clone git://github.com/youbot/youbot_driver.git Add repository folder ROS_PACKAGE_PATH environment variable. Compile youbot driver typing: rosmake youbot_driver --rosdep-install Manual installation: gnu-make software system (version required), working compiler chain. console commands exemplary Ubuntu Linux. git version control software: sudo apt-get install git git-core Cmake cross platform sudo apt-get install cmake download youBot API sources type: git clone git://github.com/youbot/youbot_driver.git Install boost. sudo apt-get install libboost-all-dev able compile youBot API. <your_folder>/youbot_driver mkdir build build cmake library generated folder ~/youbot_driver/lib. Usage youBot API give complete joint level access youBot joints. youBot joint represented youbot::YouBotJoint class API. stage difference base joint powers wheel manipulator joint. classes youbot::YouBotBase youbot::YouBotManipulator access youbot::YouBotJoint instance joint. set setpoint read sensor values form joints youbot::JointData classes. instance youbot::JointVelocitySetpoint youbot::JointSensedCurrent. configure parameters joint, youbot::JointParameter classes. instance youbot::MaximumPositioningVelocity. Programs find programs youbot_applications repository. Documentation detailed information class methods refer API documentation. generate documentation source code type: sudo apt-get install doxygen build doc Run sudo youBot Driver access raw ethernet device. Linux normal user access raw ethernet device. grand capability program tool setcap. install setcap sudo apt-get install libcap2-bin provide program raw access ethernet device (replace ./YouBot_KeyboardRemoteControl program.) sudo setcap cap_net_raw+ep ./YouBot_KeyboardRemoteControl executable created replaces building. License software published dual-license: GNU Lesser General Public License LGPL BSD license. dual-license implies users code choose terms prefer.
